name: career.grc.risk_screener
description: Screens GRC, risk, compliance, audit, SOC 2, NIST, controls, and security analyst roles against Osman's Security+/CySA+ background.

message.description: GRC, risk, compliance, audit, or security role text to evaluate.

examples: is this GRC analyst role a fit?
does this compliance analyst role match Security+ and CySA+?
what resume angle should I use for this SOC 2 role?
